overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a desert settlement at night in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning inside a food vending building, proceeding along an elevated glass walkway, and descending to a communal campfire area where people gather in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food vending area with automated machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor vending area toward the exit corridor

notable_agents.action: crouching near the vending machine examining something on the ground

entered.detail: Brightly lit automated food dispenser with 'Insta-Food' and 'BIG' branding displaying colorful food items
Long metal counter with glass bottles and items displayed on the surface
Steam or smoke rising from vents near the floor on the left side
Tall green metal locker or storage cabinet against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a narrow enclosed food vending area with artificial lighting. An Insta-Food vending machine dominates the far wall while steam rises from floor vents. A metal service counter sits in the foreground, and a green locker stands against the left wall. An NPC crouches near the vending machine as the camera walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered walkway with glass walls overlooking outdoor camp

events.description: exits the enclosed vending room into the glass-walled elevated corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated corridor with glass walls, observing the desert camp below

notable_agents.action: standing by the glass wall looking out at the camp below

entered.detail: Floor-to-ceiling glass panels providing view of the outdoor desert camp
Vertical metal beams supporting the roof structure of the walkway
Long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling of the corridor
Covered dining area with people sitting at wooden tables visible through the glass below

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered elevated walkway with glass walls overlooking the desert settlement below. Fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete floor while metal support beams line the path. Through the glass, an outdoor seating area with people at tables is visible in the distance below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert camp with makeshift dining areas and campfires

events.description: exits the building into the open desert night with rain beginning to fall
rain becomes more visible as the camera moves away from building cover

agents.ego_description: walking down from the elevated structure into the desert camp, approaching the campfire areas on muddy ground

notable_agents.action: sitting at a wooden picnic table under a canvas canopy
sitting on a bench near the building wall

entered.detail: Muddy dirt ground with sparse desert vegetation and puddles from rain
Large canvas tarp stretched overhead providing shelter for outdoor seating
Rustic wooden picnic tables and benches under the canopy
Burning campfire with visible flames and people gathered around it
Glowing green neon sign visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building into the open desert night, the camera descends onto muddy dirt ground as rain falls. Canvas canopies provide shelter over wooden picnic tables where people sit. In the distance, a campfire burns under the dark sky with a green neon sign glowing on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: communal campfire gathering with makeshift furniture

events.description: slows down and begins circling around the main campfire area

agents.ego_description: circling around the main campfire, observing the group of people socializing and drinking in the rain

notable_agents.action: sitting on a red leather couch drinking from a bottle
crouching near the campfire warming hands over the flames

entered.detail: Large stone-ringed fire pit with bright flames and sparks rising into the rain
Worn red leather sofa with people sitting and socializing
Bright red plastic chairs arranged in a semicircle around the fire
Metal barrel or trash container near the seating area
Tall metal tower structure silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera circles a large communal campfire in the open desert rain, where people gather on a red leather couch and plastic chairs. The fire illuminates the scene with warm light while a metal tower stands silhouetted in the background. The atmosphere is social and relaxed despite the rain falling on the dirt ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, enclosed vending area out into a rainy desert settlement centered around a communal fire. It begins inside a narrow food vending space filled with artificial light and rising steam, passing a metal counter and a crouching figure. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a semi-covered elevated walkway where fluorescent lights reflect off concrete and glass walls overlook a distant seating area. The scene then opens into the night air, descending from the walkway onto muddy ground as rain begins to fall over canvas canopies and wooden picnic tables. Finally, the camera circles a large, glowing campfire where people gather on leather couches and plastic chairs, with a silhouetted metal tower standing against the dark, rainy horizon.
